edge_hypothesis: Supertrend tail harvester at 5:1 R:R hit ACCEPT (PF=1.395, DD=12.3%, 85 trades) with ADX>15. The MACD R:R curve shows PF peaking at 8:1 (PF=1.442) before declining at 12:1 (PF=1.302). This spec tests whether supertrend follows the same R:R curve shape. CRITICALLY, this spec uses ADX>15 (the ACCEPT-proven threshold), NOT ADX>28 (the recent st82n4p6 spec which restricted trades to only 23). The ACCEPT had 85 trades at ADX>15 — sufficient sample size. The recent ADX>28 experiment showed PF=1.545 with only 23 trades — promising but statistically unreliable. This spec preserves the proven ADX>15 gate and ONLY varies R:R to isolate the R:R effect. Three R:R points tested: 7:1 (between existing data points), 8:1 (MACD champion's ratio), and 10:1 (tests diminishing returns). All use 1.0x ATR tight stop, matching the MACD tail harvester formula. Supertrend's ranging dominance (PF=2.002 at 5:1) suggests extreme R:R should work particularly well during ranging regimes where price bounces between range boundaries create multiple opportunities for large moves. Invalidation: (1) if PF declines monotonically from 5:1 to 10:1, supertrend's optimal R:R is LOWER than MACD's — the entry signal captures shorter moves; (2) if PF increases monotonically, the optimal point is above 10:1 — extend testing further; (3) if trade count drops below 30, the tight stop is killing too many trades before they reach TP.

variants.name: supertrend_tail_harvester_7to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/4h with ADX>15 (ACCEPT-proven gate) and 7:1 R:R (1.0x stop / 7.0x TP). This fills the gap between the 5:1 ACCEPT (PF=1.395) and the untested 8:1. If PF rises from 5:1 to 7:1, the curve matches MACD's shape. At breakeven win rate of 12.5%, this is very forgiving — only 1 in 8 trades needs to reach TP.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate — matches the ACCEPT configuration, not the recent ADX>28 experiment).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (supertrend direction change to bearish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate — matches the ACCEPT configuration).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (7.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
R:R = 7:1. Needs 12.5% win rate to break even after fees.
Tests intermediate R:R point between 5:1 ACCEPT and 8:1 MACD-champion ratio.
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 7.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — ACCEPT-proven entry signal
ADX_14 > 15 — ACCEPT-proven relaxed gate preserving 85-trade sample size
ATR_14 for 1.0x stop / 7.0x TP — R:R curve interpolation between 5:1 ACCEPT and 8:1

variants.name: supertrend_tail_harvester_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/4h with ADX>15 and 8:1 R:R (1.0x stop / 8.0x TP). This is the critical test: does the MACD champion's R:R ratio (8:1 → PF=1.442) replicate on supertrend? At breakeven win rate of 11%, this is very forgiving. The supertrend 5:1 ACCEPT had ranging PF=2.002 — if ranging trades produce large bounded moves that reach 8x ATR when ranges break out, this could be the supertrend champion variant.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate — matches the ACCEPT configuration).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (supertrend direction change to bearish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate — matches the ACCEPT configuration).

Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
R:R = 8:1. Needs 11% win rate to break even after fees.
Critical test: does MACD champion R:R replicate on supertrend?

Take profit at 8.0x ATR_14 from entry.

ADX_14 > 15 — preserves ACCEPT sample size for reliable comparison

variants.name: supertrend_tail_harvester_10to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/4h with ADX>15 and 10:1 R:R (1.0x stop / 10.0x TP). Diminishing returns test. MACD showed decline from 8:1 (PF=1.442) to 12:1 (PF=1.302). Does supertrend decline at the same rate? If supertrend 10:1 PF is HIGHER than its 8:1 PF, the supertrend R:R curve peaks later than MACD — possible because supertrend's ranging dominance captures range breakouts that produce exceptionally large moves. At breakeven win rate of 9%, nearly any signal with occasional large continuations is profitable.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate — matches the ACCEPT configuration).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (supertrend direction change to bearish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate — matches the ACCEPT configuration).

Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
R:R = 10:1. Needs 9% win rate to break even after fees.
Diminishing returns test: maps the supertrend R:R decline curve.
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry.
